rows.title: Adaptive KV-Cache Compression for On-Device LLM Inference
rows.abstract: An attention-entropy-driven compression scheme that reduces on-device KV-cache memory while preserving accuracy.
excerpts: Entropy-guided precision control reduces cache memory by 40 percent.

rows.title: Mobile NPU KV-cache management apparatus
rows.abstract: A static-ratio KV-cache management apparatus for mobile neural processing units.
